ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale was made */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type of the sale */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sales" TEXT /* Total sales amount */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale (e.g., cash, credit card, online payment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., 'NE' for North East) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type of the inventory item */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the inventory item is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the inventory item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the inventory item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type of the order */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the order is being made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product type being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the sales report */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type of the sales report */,
  "sales" TEXT /* Total sales amount for the report */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Total units sold for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory report */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type of the inventory report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the inventory report */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product type in the report */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the inventory item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reports_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_hierarchy" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_hierarchy_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product of the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_hierarchy ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_supplier" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "supplier_id")
)
